D148 backend-required graph helper. No public submit API is exposed; the
backend starts work only after this helper installs the graph-local fence.

## Import

```ts
import { workerDerived } from "@graphrefly/ts/graph";
```

## Signature

```ts
function workerDerived(
	graph: Graph,
	deps: readonly Node<unknown>[],
	opts: WorkerDerivedOptions<TInput, TResult>,
): Node<TResult>
```

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `graph` | `Graph` | Missing @param graph JSDoc. |
| `deps` | `readonly Node<unknown>[]` | Missing @param deps JSDoc. |
| `opts` | `WorkerDerivedOptions<TInput, TResult>` | Missing @param opts JSDoc. |

## Returns

`Node<TResult>`
